document.title: REQUESTED APPROVAL / P.C.B. MANUFACTURING SPEC
document.documentType: PCB approval document and manufacturing specification

sourceSummary.oneLine: Approval and manufacturing specification for CYAN_MAIN_2500812-F PCB issued with customer record dated 2025.08.22.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Used as a requested approval sheet and PCB manufacturing specification, including revision history, board construction, materials, finishes, plating, and fabrication requirements.
keyPoints: Revision history records revision 1 as 신규등록 dated 2025.08.22.
PCB type is multilayer M/S 8L using FR-4 material.
Final thickness is 1.2T +/- 10%, and kit size is 173.00 mm x 435.00 mm ± 0.2 mm.
Finish requirements include green solder mask, white marking, Cu minimum 20 um, and ENIG gold plating with Ni 3 um and Au 0.03 um.
PCB structure lists 8 layers and total thickness of 1,274.00 um.

evidence.claim: The final thickness is 1.2T +/- 10% with base copper H/Hoz.
The kit size is 173.00 mm x 435.00 mm ± 0.2 mm.
Solder mask color is green on both solder side and component side, with DYS-2000 DG-50HGM and DYS-2000 DG-HFM specified.
evidence.evidenceText: ■ SOLDER MASK - SOLDER SIDE COLOR : GREEN (DYS-2000 DG-50HGM) - COMPONENT SIDE COLOR : GREEN (DYS-2000 DG-HFM)

evidence.claim: Marking color is white on both solder side and component side, with TAIYO IJR-4000 MW301 specified.
evidence.evidenceText: ■ MARKING - SOLDER SIDE COLOR : WHITE (TAIYO IJR-4000 MW301 ) - COMPONENT SIDE COLOR : WHITE (TAIYO IJR-4000 MW301 )

evidence.claim: Gold finish is ENIG with Ni 3 um and Au 0.03 um.
Terminal gold plating is marked NO.
Outline processing is router and V-cut two times.
evidence.evidenceText: 10. 외형가공 ■ ROUTER □ 금 형 ■ V-CUT ( 2 회) □ NC 단차 가공

evidence.claim: The PCB structure specifies 8 layers and total thickness of 1,274.00 um.
evidence.evidenceText: P. C . B . STRUCTURE ... LAYER 8L ... TOTAL THICKNESS 1,274.00 ㎛
